mapper.insert: insert into exchangeOrder(orderNo, userId, recycleId, couponId, newProductId, addressId, productPrice, discountAmount, payAmount, status) values(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{recycleId}, #{couponId}, #{newProductId}, #{addressId}, #{productPrice}, #{discountAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{status})
mapper.select: select * from exchangeOrder order by createTime desc
select * from exchangeOrder where userId = #{userId} order by createTime desc
